summary: Yt Audio Software Criteria component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「音频软体选择三条件」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-audio-software-criteria/src/YtAudioSoftwareCriteria.tsx` and `remotion/yt-audio-software-criteria/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtAudioSoftwareCriteria` and `ytAudioSoftwareCriteriaDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Audio Software Criteria Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-audio-software-criteria to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtAudioSoftwareCriteriaProps API and register the YtAudioSoftwareCriteria composition with the default props.
